body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**Spontaneous and deliberate creative cognition during and after psilocybin exposure.**. Transl Psychiatry.. PMID: 33833225. DOI: 10.1038/s41398-021-01335-5. Creativity is an essential cognitive ability linked to all areas of our everyday functioning. Thus, finding away to enhance it is of broad interest. Alarge number of anecdotal reports suggest that the consumption of psychedelic drugs can enhance creative thinking; however, scientific evidence is lacking.
